PayPal.CountryCode.description: Shopper's country of residence in the form of ISO standard 3166 2-character country codes.

PayPal.PayerId.description: Unique PayPal Customer Account identification number. Character length and limitations: 13 single-byte alphanumeric characters.

PayPal.ProtectionEligibility.description:
Allowed values:
* **Eligible** — Merchant is protected by PayPal's Seller Protection Policy for Unauthorized Payments and Item Not Received.

* **PartiallyEligible** — Merchant is protected by PayPal's Seller Protection Policy for Item Not Received.

* **Ineligible** — Merchant is not protected under the Seller Protection Policy.

PayPal.TransactionId.description: Unique transaction ID of the payment.

avsResultRaw.description: Raw AVS result received from the acquirer, where available. Example: D

bin.description: The Bank Identification Number of a credit card, which is the first six digits of a card number. Required for [tokenized card request](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/standalone-risk#tokenised-pan-request).

cvcResultRaw.description: Raw CVC result received from the acquirer, where available. Example: 1

riskToken.description: Unique identifier or token for the shopper's card details.

threeDAuthenticated.description: A Boolean value indicating whether 3DS authentication was completed on this payment. Example: true

threeDOffered.description: A Boolean value indicating whether 3DS was offered for this payment. Example: true

tokenDataType.description: Required for PayPal payments only. The only supported value is: **paypal**.
